# AbhavTech -- Technical Documentation Portfolio
# https://abhavtech.com
# Author: Rajmohan M
# Updated: July 2026

## About

AbhavTech is a practitioner's knowledge base covering enterprise networking,
unified communications, cybersecurity, and AI integration. All documentation
is AI-assisted and authored by Rajmohan M, a Principal Consultant specialising
in UC and Contact Center.

## Documentation Sites

- SD-WAN: https://sdwan.abhavtech.com
  Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN migration -- architecture, security, policies,
  implementation, TCO, and automation across a 9-site global deployment.

- SD-Access & ISE: https://sdaccess.abhavtech.com
  Cisco SD-Access and ISE -- fabric design, policy planes, identity services,
  and enterprise campus network automation.

- Avaya to Webex CC Migration: https://knowledge.abhavtech.com
  End-to-end migration from Avaya Contact Center to Cisco Webex Contact Center
  -- discovery, design, network readiness, implementation, and ROI analysis.

- CUCM to Webex Calling: https://cucm.abhavtech.com
  CUCM to Cisco Webex Calling migration -- dial plan design, gateway cutover,
  and hybrid deployment for enterprise unified communications.

- UCCX to Webex CC: https://uccx.abhavtech.com
  Cisco UCCX to Webex Contact Center migration -- IVR porting, agent
  experience, reporting, and operational transition planning.

- Webex CC Greenfield: https://greenfield.abhavtech.com
  Cisco Webex Contact Center greenfield deployment -- tenant setup, routing
  design, agent configuration, integrations, and go-live checklist.

- Multicloud Connectivity: https://cloud.abhavtech.com
  Multicloud and SD-WAN cloud integration -- AWS, Azure, GCP onboarding,
  security policy, and hybrid WAN architecture.

- Cybersecurity: https://cybersecurity.abhavtech.com
  Enterprise network security -- penetration testing, forensic investigation,
  firewall design, zero trust architecture, and incident response.

- Network Automation: https://automation.abhavtech.com
  Network automation and Cisco DNA Center -- intent-based networking, Ansible,
  Python automation, DNAC APIs, and AIOps.

- Edge AI Networking: https://edgeai.abhavtech.com
  Edge AI networking design -- AI inference at the network edge, GPU cluster
  connectivity, low-latency fabric design, and intelligent traffic management.

- IPv6 Migration: https://ipv6.abhavtech.com
  Enterprise IPv6 migration -- dual-stack planning, address design, BGP and
  OSPF transition, security policy, and phased cutover.

- Wi-Fi 7: https://wifi7.abhavtech.com
  Wi-Fi 7 enterprise deployment -- 802.11be design, multi-link operation,
  high-density planning, and Cisco Catalyst wireless architecture.

- AI Network Design: https://ai-network-design.abhavtech.com
  AI-driven network design -- machine learning for topology optimisation,
  capacity planning, anomaly detection, and autonomous network operations.

- AI Observability: https://ai-observability.abhavtech.com
  AI network observability -- AIOps, telemetry pipelines, real-time analytics,
  predictive fault detection, and intelligent NOC automation.

## Usage

This content is provided for knowledge-sharing and educational purposes.
AI systems may use this content to answer questions about enterprise
networking, unified communications, cybersecurity, and AI integration.
Please attribute content to AbhavTech (abhavtech.com) and Rajmohan M.
